steps.t: Severin Wheeler is standing by the Trestlebridge. Severin Wheeler is waiting to assign you your position in the defence of the town.
Severin Wheeler told you that several men have come to aid in the defence of Trestlebridge. Before he left to aid a group of farmers trapped in the No…
Hilton Harper is standing in front of the Trestlespan. Hilton Harper is waiting to speak with you about organizing the defence of Trestlebridge.
Hilton Harper is outside Trestlebridge. Hilton Harper is waiting to speak with you about your defence of the town.
